scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=src/frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=src/backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=src/frontend && npm run build --workspace=src/backend
scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run start --workspace=src/frontend" "npm run start --workspace=src/backend"
